proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: `stage_iv=1` was associated with 1.549 fewer months of PFS after adjustment (SE 0.011; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A 1-SD increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with lower adjusted `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: Each 1-SD higher `ecog_ps` was associated with 0.794 fewer months of PFS (SE 0.005; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients without brain metastases.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: `has_brain_mets=1` was associated with 0.983 fewer PFS months (SE 0.017; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A 1-SD increase in `age_years` is associated with higher adjusted `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: Older age showed a strong positive cohort association: +1.749 PFS months per 1-SD higher `age_years` (SE 0.005; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A 1-SD increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower adjusted `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: Higher recent weight loss was associated with 0.296 fewer PFS months per SD (SE 0.005; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A 1-SD increase in `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher adjusted `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: Higher albumin was associated with 0.238 more PFS months per SD (SE 0.005; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A 1-SD increase in `ki67_pct` is associated with lower adjusted `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: Higher `ki67_pct` was associated with 0.230 fewer PFS months per SD (SE 0.005; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 1 have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients without `pik3ca_mutation`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: `pik3ca_mutation=1` was associated with 0.582 fewer PFS months (SE 0.011; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `er_positive` equal to 1 have higher adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `er_positive` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: `er_positive=1` was associated with 0.532 more PFS months (SE 0.015; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `her2_positive` equal to 1 have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `her2_positive` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: `her2_positive=1` was associated with 0.471 fewer PFS months (SE 0.014; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A 1-SD increase in `ldh_u_l` is associated with lower adjusted `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: Higher `ldh_u_l` was associated with a small but significant 0.042-month lower PFS per SD (SE 0.005; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_palbociclib` equal to 1 have higher adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients without `treatment_palbociclib`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_palbociclib=1` had the only large adjusted treatment main effect: +1.101 PFS months (SE 0.011; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_palbociclib` with `pfs_months` is larger when `er_positive` equals 1 than when `er_positive` equals 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on treatment, modifier, treatment:modifier, and clinical covariates; effect_estimate is the interaction coefficient in months.
analyses.result_summary: The palbociclib-by-ER interaction was strongly positive: +1.559 months (SE 0.022; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_palbociclib` with `pfs_months` is smaller when `her2_positive` equals 1 than when `her2_positive` equals 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on treatment, modifier, treatment:modifier, and clinical covariates; effect_estimate is the interaction coefficient in months.
analyses.result_summary: The palbociclib-by-HER2-positive interaction was strongly negative: -1.337 months (SE 0.027; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_palbociclib` with `pfs_months` is smaller when `pik3ca_mutation` equals 1 than when `pik3ca_mutation` equals 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on treatment, modifier, treatment:modifier, and clinical covariates; effect_estimate is the interaction coefficient in months.
analyses.result_summary: The palbociclib-by-PIK3CA interaction was strongly negative: -1.665 months (SE 0.021; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_palbociclib` with `pfs_months` is larger when `pr_positive` equals 1 than when `pr_positive` equals 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on treatment, modifier, treatment:modifier, and clinical covariates; effect_estimate is the interaction coefficient in months.
analyses.result_summary: The palbociclib-by-PR-positive interaction was positive: +1.029 months (SE 0.022; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_palbociclib` with `pfs_months` is larger when `her2_low` equals 1 than when `her2_low` equals 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on treatment, modifier, treatment:modifier, and clinical covariates; effect_estimate is the interaction coefficient in months.
analyses.result_summary: The palbociclib-by-HER2-low interaction was positive: +0.382 months (SE 0.022; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `er_positive` equal to 1, `her2_positive` equal to 0, and `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 0, `treatment_palbociclib` equal to 1 is associated with higher adjusted `pfs_months` than no `treatment_palbociclib`.

analyses.code: Adjusted subgroup OLS restricted to the named subgroup, with pfs_months regressed on treatment_palbociclib and clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Within the ER-positive/HER2-negative/PIK3CA-wildtype subgroup (n=18681), palbociclib was associated with +2.920 PFS months (SE 0.020; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within patients with `er_positive` equal to 1 and `her2_positive` equal to 0, the positive association of `treatment_palbociclib` with `pfs_months` is smaller when `pik3ca_mutation` equals 1.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS restricted to er_positive=1 and her2_positive=0 with treatment_palbociclib, pik3ca_mutation, and their interaction.
analyses.result_summary: Within the ER-positive/HER2-negative subgroup (n=28589), the palbociclib-by-PIK3CA interaction was -2.918 months (SE 0.029; p<1e-14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_tamoxifen` with `pfs_months` is larger when `er_positive` equals 1 than when `er_positive` equals 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on treatment, modifier, treatment:modifier, and clinical covariates; effect_estimate is the interaction coefficient in months.
analyses.result_summary: Tamoxifen did not show ER-specific benefit: interaction +0.011 months (SE 0.027; p=0.683).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_trastuzumab` with `pfs_months` is larger when `her2_positive` equals 1 or `her2_amplification` equals 1 than otherwise.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on treatment, modifier, treatment:modifier, and clinical covariates; effect_estimate is the interaction coefficient in months.
analyses.result_summary: Trastuzumab did not show enrichment in HER2-positive or HER2-amplified patients: interaction -0.007 months (SE 0.034; p=0.846).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_olaparib` with `pfs_months` is larger when either `brca1_mutation` or `brca2_mutation` equals 1 than when both equal 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on treatment, modifier, treatment:modifier, and clinical covariates; effect_estimate is the interaction coefficient in months.
analyses.result_summary: Olaparib did not show statistically significant enrichment in BRCA-mutated patients: interaction +0.043 months (SE 0.087; p=0.621).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_pembrolizumab` with `pfs_months` is larger in triple-negative patients (`er_positive=0`, `pr_positive=0`, and `her2_positive=0`) than in other patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on treatment, modifier, treatment:modifier, and clinical covariates; effect_estimate is the interaction coefficient in months.
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab showed a small positive but non-significant triple-negative interaction: +0.063 months (SE 0.038; p=0.103).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` with `pfs_months` is larger when `has_brain_mets` equals 1 than when `has_brain_mets` equals 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on treatment, modifier, treatment:modifier, and clinical covariates; effect_estimate is the interaction coefficient in months.
analyses.result_summary: Sacituzumab govitecan had a modest positive interaction with brain metastases: +0.193 months (SE 0.063; p=0.0021).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A 1-SD increase in `tumor_size_cm` is associated with lower adjusted `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months on the named predictor plus treatment, biomarker, disease-burden, performance-status, and lab covariates; continuous predictors were z-scored.
analyses.result_summary: Contrary to the hypothesis, `tumor_size_cm` had a near-zero positive adjusted coefficient: +0.002 months per SD (SE 0.005; p=0.650).
